div.p: Book your appointment with our professional team
Select the branch where you'd like your appointment

div.t-att-class: 'selected' if selected_branch and branch.id == selected_branch.id else ''

div.p: Select the professional you'd like to work with

div.class: rounded-circle d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center mx-auto staff-avatar-placeholder

div.p: Please contact us directly for appointments.

div.style: border-radius: 20px; overflow: hidden; background: linear-gradient(to right, #0d1117, #111827); position: relative;
position: absolute; top: -30px; right: -30px; width: 120px; height: 120px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); z-index: 1;
position: absolute; bottom: -20px; left: -40px; width: 100px; height: 100px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); z-index: 1;

div.class: hour-item d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center p-2 mb-2
hour-item d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center p-2 mb-2
hour-item d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center p-2 mb-2
hour-item d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center p-2 mb-2
hour-item d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center p-2 mb-2
hour-item d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center p-2 mb-2

div.p: Select a branch to view hours

div.style: width: 36px; height: 36px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-right: 15px;
width: 36px; height: 36px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-right: 15px;
width: 36px; height: 36px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-right: 15px;

div.p: Select a branch to view contact information

div.style: border-radius: 15px; background: linear-gradient(to right, rgba(255,255,255,0.03), rgba(255,255,255,0.01));

input.placeholder: Search for services by name or description...

div.style: background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.03), rgba(255,255,255,0.01)); border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); border-left: 4px solid #ffffff; position: relative; overflow: hidden;
position: absolute; top: -15px; right: -15px; width: 100px; height: 100px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); z-index: 1;

width: 40px; height: 40px; min-width: 40px; background: #fff; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-right: 15px; box-shadow: 0 3px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.3) 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0) 50%); border-radius: 16px 0 0 16px;

span.style: background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); color: #ffffff; border-radius: 30px; padding: 8px 15px; font-weight: normal;
background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); color: #666; border-radius: 30px; padding: 8px 15px; font-weight: normal;

div.p: Please contact us directly for service information.
Select your preferred date and time
Click on a date to view available time slots

div.style: background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.03), rgba(255,255,255,0.01)); border-radius: 12px; border-left: 4px solid #ffffff;
position: absolute; top: -20px; right: -20px; width: 80px; height: 80px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); z-index: 1;
width: 60px; height: 60px; min-width: 60px; border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); margin-right: 15px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);

width: 60px; height: 60px; min-width: 60px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border-radius: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-right: 15px; box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);

span.style: background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); color: #ffffff; border-radius: 30px; padding: 5px 10px; font-weight: normal;

div.style: position: absolute; top: -15px; right: -15px; width: 60px; height: 60px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); z-index: 1;

width: 60px; height: 60px; min-width: 60px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-right: 15px; box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); border: 3px solid white;

t.p: We'll assign the best available specialist for your chosen time.

div.style: border-radius: 15px; border: 2px dashed rgba(201,149,106,0.4); padding: 15px; display: none; position: relative; overflow: hidden;
position: absolute; top: -15px; left: -15px; width: 60px; height: 60px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); z-index: 1;
position: absolute; bottom: -20px; right: -20px; width: 80px; height: 80px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); z-index: 1;
width: 40px; height: 40px; min-width: 40px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-right: 12px;

div.label: What results are you hoping to achieve?

textarea.name: desired_lash_look
textarea.placeholder: e.g., Natural look, Dramatic, Subtle enhancement...

form.p: You'll receive a confirmation email with your booking details

div.p: Your appointment has been successfully booked.
There was an issue processing your booking.

div.label: M-Pesa Phone Number *
div.small: Enter your M-Pesa registered phone number

div.p: There was an issue processing your payment.
Please check your phone and enter your M-Pesa PIN to complete the payment.
div.div: You should receive an M-Pesa prompt on your phone. Once you complete the payment, this page will automatically update.

div.p: Your appointment has been confirmed and payment processed.
